provenance.prompt: hand-painted fantasy RPG inventory icon, single item centered on solid dark navy background, painterly brushwork, warm top-left lighting, rich earth tones with jewel accents, clean silhouette, concept art quality, strength elixir in a thick reinforced glass flask, wide-bodied bottle with iron bands riveted around the middle, deep amber-orange liquid with visible effervescence and rising bubbles, heavy iron screw cap, the flask looks sturdy and industrial compared to delicate potion bottles, warm amber glow
provenance.negative_prompt: blurry, text, letters, runes, watermark, signature, 3d render, ambient occlusion, photorealistic, photograph, multiple items, two objects, cropped, cut off, pixel art, cel-shaded, flat shading, neon colors, gradient background, white background, light background, modern, sci-fi, futuristic, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, frame, border, vignette

judgment.explanation: Single reinforced flask, deep blue with amber center window, iron bands. Looks industrial and sturdy. Dark bg, strong icon silhouette. Unique and on-style.
